title: plumeria montana
intro: Plumeria montana, also known as the Himalayan frangipani or Himalayan plumeria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Plumeria montana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments that can be applied topically or taken internally.
